SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-09-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-09-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ALISON SALVI RECORDS HOLDER FOR US REGENTS AND PHYLLIS SIMMONS, WORKERS' COMPENSATION MANAGER . DEFENDANT NETALI ANTONIO PEREZ AVILES IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER PATRICIA BINAISA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE REGENTS OF THE UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ AVILES, NEFTALI ANTONIO $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
